title: Add conversational status reporter for active workflow progress and blocked steps
summary: Create the coordinating agent that interprets user goals, selects workflows, delegates work, tracks progress, and reports status without performing implementation work directly.
acceptanceCriteria: Chief of Staff coordinates workflows and agents without directly owning implementation output.
Every recommendation, delegation, and status report includes traceable context and next action.
Ambiguous or high-risk requests produce clarification or approval prompts instead of unsafe execution.
source: Hermes OS Conversational Operating Layer (COL) specification v1.0
reviewNotes: Implemented the Hermes OS Conversational Operating Layer MVP through hermes_os_integration.conversational. Added deterministic intent routing, Chief of Staff planning, workflow previews, session/project memory context, dynamic command suggestions, agent hierarchy/delegation records, guardrails, dashboard panels, API endpoint, CLI preview command, frontend API helper, and focused regression tests. Validated with .venv/bin/pytest tests/hermes_os_integration/test_conversational_operating_layer.py and .venv/bin/python -m hermes_cli.main ask Build a CRM for wholesalers --project .
